---
title: "Bayesian Sensitivity Analysis (Objective iii)"
author: "Valiao, Syrelle Kaye D."
date: "2026-01-29"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{amsmath}
  - \usepackage{amssymb}
  - \usepackage{graphicx}
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, eval = TRUE,
                      fig.pos = "H")

# ── RERUN CONTROL ────────────────────────────────────────
RERUN_SENSITIVITY <- FALSE    # Change to TRUE if you modify sensitivity specs
# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Load CEVAE outputs (prerequisite)
cevae_workspace <- "~/thesis_char/Thesis/cevae_workspace.RData"
# Load INLA outputs (prerequisite)
inla_workspace <- "~/thesis_char/Thesis/inla_workspace.RData"
# Load existing Sensitivity results if available
sens_workspace <- "~/thesis_char/Thesis/sensitivity_workspace.RData"

if (file.exists(cevae_workspace)) {
  load(cevae_workspace)
  cat("✓ CEVAE workspace loaded\n")
}

if (file.exists(inla_workspace)) {
  load(inla_workspace)
  cat("✓ INLA workspace loaded\n")
}

if (file.exists(sens_workspace) && !RERUN_SENSITIVITY) {
  load(sens_workspace)
  cat("✓ Sensitivity workspace loaded (RERUN = FALSE)\n")
}

set.seed(0942)
```

```{r loading}
library(INLA)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

inla.setOption(num.threads = 10)
inla.setOption(smtp = "taucs")

# ── Shared helpers (defined here so chunk-skipping in axis1–3 is safe) ────────
M     <- 5
n_obs <- nrow(inla_input[inla_input$imputation_id == 1, ])
df_m1 <- mate_results$df[mate_results$model == "M1"][1]
t_crit <- qt(0.975, df = df_m1)
sigma_seq <- seq(0, 0.55, length.out = 200)

prepare_dat <- function(dat_m) {
  active_cols <- c("z_mean_1", "z_mean_7", "z_mean_10")
  dat_m %>%
    mutate(
      urban_bin     = as.numeric(urban == "Urban"),
      z_active_mean = rowMeans(across(all_of(active_cols))),
      z_std         = as.numeric(scale(z_active_mean)),
      age_std       = as.numeric(scale(age)),
      sex_bin       = as.numeric(sex == "Female"),
      educ_std      = as.numeric(scale(as.numeric(as.character(education)))),
      year_fact     = factor(survey_year),
      prov_id       = as.integer(factor(province_code)),
      region_id     = as.integer(factor(region)),
      spatial_id    = if_else(is.na(prov_id), region_id, prov_id)
    )
}

rubin_pool <- function(Q_vec, U_vec, df_adj) {
  M_      <- length(Q_vec)
  Q_bar   <- mean(Q_vec)
  U_bar   <- mean(U_vec)
  B       <- var(Q_vec)
  T_var   <- U_bar + (1 + 1 / M_) * B
  SE_pool <- sqrt(T_var)
  t_crit  <- qt(0.975, df = df_adj)
  data.frame(
    MATE     = round(Q_bar,                    4),
    SE       = round(SE_pool,                  4),
    CI_low   = round(Q_bar - t_crit * SE_pool, 4),
    CI_high  = round(Q_bar + t_crit * SE_pool, 4),
    MATE_exp = round(exp(Q_bar),               4)
  )
}

cat("Models available:", names(inla_fits), "\n")
cat("Imputations per model:", length(inla_fits[["M1"]]), "\n")
cat("MATE results:\n"); print(mate_results[, c("model", "MATE", "CI_low", "CI_high")])
```

```{r axis1, eval = RERUN_SENSITIVITY, cache=TRUE}
# ── AXIS 1: Residual Confounding Sensitivity (Gustafson / McCandless) ─────────
cat("\nAxis 1: Residual Confounding Sensitivity\n")

sigma_gamma_vals <- c(0, 0.05, 0.10, 0.20, 0.50)

mate_base <- inla_fits[["M1"]] |>
  lapply(\(fit) fit$summary.fixed["urban_bin", "mean"]) |>
  unlist() |> mean()

se_base <- {
  Q_vec <- inla_fits[["M1"]] |>
    lapply(\(fit) fit$summary.fixed["urban_bin", "mean"]) |> unlist()
  U_vec <- inla_fits[["M1"]] |>
    lapply(\(fit) fit$summary.fixed["urban_bin", "sd"]^2) |> unlist()
  B     <- var(Q_vec)
  U_bar <- mean(U_vec)
  sqrt(U_bar + (1 + 1/M) * B)
}

axis1_results <- data.frame(sigma_gamma = sigma_gamma_vals) |>
  mutate(
    SE            = sqrt(se_base^2 + sigma_gamma^2),
    CI_low        = mate_base - t_crit * SE,
    CI_high       = mate_base + t_crit * SE,
    MATE          = mate_base,
    MATE_exp      = exp(mate_base),
    excludes_zero = ifelse(CI_low > 0, "Yes", "No")
  ) |>
  select(sigma_gamma, MATE, SE, CI_low, CI_high, MATE_exp, excludes_zero)

cat("Residual confounding sensitivity (M1 base):\n")
print(axis1_results)

write.csv(axis1_results, "sensitivity_axis1_residual_confounding.csv", row.names = FALSE)

sigma_tipping <- sqrt(
  pmax((mate_base / t_crit)^2 - se_base^2, 0)
)
cat(sprintf("Tipping-point sigma_gamma: %.4f\n", sigma_tipping))
```



```{r axis2, eval = RERUN_SENSITIVITY, cache=FALSE}
# AXIS 2: Spatial precision prior sensitivity
# Vary PC prior: tight / base (current) / diffuse
cat("\nAxis 2: Spatial Prior Sensitivity\n")

spatial_priors <- list(
  tight   = list(prec = list(prior = "pc.prec", param = c(0.5, 0.01))),
  base    = list(prec = list(prior = "pc.prec", param = c(1.0, 0.01))),
  diffuse = list(prec = list(prior = "pc.prec", param = c(2.0, 0.01)))
)

axis2_fits    <- list()
axis2_results <- list()

set.seed(0942)
for (prior_name in names(spatial_priors)) {

  cat(sprintf("\n  Fitting M1 with %s spatial prior...\n", prior_name))
  prior_spec <- spatial_priors[[prior_name]]

  formula_sens <- log_uic ~
    urban_bin + z_std +
    age_std + sex_bin + educ_std + year_fact +
    f(spatial_id, model = "iid", hyper = prior_spec)

  fits_prior <- vector("list", M)

  for (m in 1:M) {
    cat(sprintf("    Imputation %d/5...", m))
    dat_m <- inla_input %>% filter(imputation_id == m) %>% prepare_dat()

    fits_prior[[m]] <- inla(
      formula_sens,
      family            = "gaussian",
      data              = dat_m,
      weights           = dat_m$weight,
      control.compute   = list(dic = TRUE, waic = TRUE),
      control.predictor = list(compute = FALSE)
    )
    cat(sprintf(" DIC = %.2f\n", fits_prior[[m]]$dic$dic))
  }

  axis2_fits[[prior_name]] <- fits_prior

  mate_tbl <- lapply(1:M, function(m) {
    row <- fits_prior[[m]]$summary.fixed["urban_bin", ]
    data.frame(Q = row$mean, U = row$sd^2)
  }) %>% bind_rows()

  # Compute df for this prior
  n_par  <- nrow(fits_prior[[1]]$summary.fixed)
  B      <- var(mate_tbl$Q)
  U_bar  <- mean(mate_tbl$U)
  T_var  <- U_bar + (1 + 1/M) * B
  lambda <- (1 + 1/M) * B / T_var
  df_old <- (M - 1) / max(lambda, 1e-10)^2
  df_obs <- (n_obs - n_par) * (1 - lambda)
  df_adj <- (df_old * df_obs) / (df_old + df_obs)

  res             <- rubin_pool(mate_tbl$Q, mate_tbl$U, df_adj)
  res$prior       <- prior_name
  res$prior_param <- sprintf("P(sigma > %.1f) = 0.01",
                             spatial_priors[[prior_name]]$prec$param[1])
  axis2_results[[prior_name]] <- res
}

axis2_tbl <- bind_rows(axis2_results) %>%
  select(prior, prior_param, MATE, SE, CI_low, CI_high, MATE_exp)

cat("\nSpatial prior sensitivity:\n")
print(axis2_tbl)
write.csv(axis2_tbl, "sensitivity_axis2_spatial_prior.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r axis3, eval = RERUN_SENSITIVITY, cache=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
# AXIS 3: Latent dimension selection sensitivity
# KL threshold: > 50 / > 100 / > 200 vs active dims (4,7,9)
cat("\nAxis 3: Latent Dimension Selection Sensitivity\n")

# Load kl_df (rebuild from z_df if needed)
z_mean_cols <- paste0("z_mean_", 1:10)
z_sd_cols   <- paste0("z_sd_",   1:10)

kl_df <- z_df %>%
  group_by(imputation_id) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(z_mean_cols), mean),
            across(all_of(z_sd_cols),   mean)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-imputation_id, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(
    dim  = as.integer(str_extract(variable, "\\d+")),
    type = if_else(str_starts(variable, "z_mean"), "mean", "sd")
  ) %>%
  select(-variable) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = type, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(kl = 0.5 * (mean^2 + sd^2 - log(sd^2) - 1))

# Active dims per threshold (averaged across imputations)
kl_mean_by_dim <- kl_df %>%
  group_by(dim) %>%
  summarise(kl_mean = mean(kl))

cat("KL divergence by dimension:\n")
print(kl_mean_by_dim)

dim_sets <- list(
  "Manual (1,7,10)" = c(1,7,10),
  "KL > 0.25" = kl_mean_by_dim$dim[kl_mean_by_dim$kl_mean > 0.25],
  "KL > 0.5" = kl_mean_by_dim$dim[kl_mean_by_dim$kl_mean > 0.5],
  "KL > 1.0" = kl_mean_by_dim$dim[kl_mean_by_dim$kl_mean > 1.0]
)

cat("\nDimension sets per threshold:\n")
for (nm in names(dim_sets)) cat(sprintf("  %s: dims %s\n", nm,
                                         paste(dim_sets[[nm]], collapse = ", ")))

set.seed(0942)
axis3_results <- lapply(names(dim_sets), function(set_name) {

  dims     <- dim_sets[[set_name]]
  
  if (length(dims) == 0) {
    cat(sprintf("\n  Skipping '%s' — no dimensions exceeded threshold.\n", set_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  dim_cols <- paste0("z_mean_", dims)

  cat(sprintf("\n  Fitting: %s (dims: %s)...\n", set_name,
              paste(dims, collapse = ", ")))

  # Redefine prepare_dat with this dim set
  prepare_dat_dims <- function(dat_m, dim_cols) {
    dat_m %>%
      mutate(
        urban_bin     = as.numeric(urban == "Urban"),
        z_active_mean = rowMeans(across(all_of(dim_cols))),
        z_std         = as.numeric(scale(z_active_mean)),
        age_std       = as.numeric(scale(age)),
        sex_bin       = as.numeric(sex == "Female"),
        educ_std      = as.numeric(scale(as.numeric(as.character(education)))),
        year_fact     = factor(survey_year),
        prov_id       = as.integer(factor(province_code)),
        region_id     = as.integer(factor(region)),
        spatial_id = if_else(is.na(prov_id), region_id, prov_id)
      )
  }

  fits_dims <- vector("list", M)

  for (m in 1:M) {
    cat(sprintf("    Imputation %d/5...", m))
    dat_m <- inla_input %>% filter(imputation_id == m) %>% 
      prepare_dat_dims(dim_cols = dim_cols)

    fits_dims[[m]] <- inla(
      log_uic ~ urban_bin + z_std +
        age_std + sex_bin + educ_std + year_fact +
        f(spatial_id, model = "iid",
          hyper = list(prec = list(prior = "pc.prec", param = c(1, 0.01)))),
      family            = "gaussian",
      data              = dat_m,
      weights           = dat_m$weight,
      control.compute   = list(dic = TRUE, waic = TRUE),
      control.predictor = list(compute = FALSE)
    )
    cat(sprintf(" DIC = %.2f\n", fits_dims[[m]]$dic$dic))
  }

  mate_tbl <- lapply(1:M, function(m) {
    row <- fits_dims[[m]]$summary.fixed["urban_bin", ]
    data.frame(Q = row$mean, U = row$sd^2)
  }) %>% bind_rows()

  n_par  <- nrow(fits_dims[[1]]$summary.fixed)
  B      <- var(mate_tbl$Q)
  U_bar  <- mean(mate_tbl$U)
  T_var  <- U_bar + (1 + 1/M) * B
  lambda <- (1 + 1/M) * B / T_var
  df_old <- (M - 1) / max(lambda, 1e-10)^2
  df_obs <- (n_obs - n_par) * (1 - lambda)
  df_adj <- (df_old * df_obs) / (df_old + df_obs)

  res          <- rubin_pool(mate_tbl$Q, mate_tbl$U, df_adj)
  res$dim_set  <- set_name
  res$dims     <- paste(dims, collapse = ", ")
  res$n_dims   <- length(dims)
  res

}) %>% bind_rows() %>%
  select(dim_set, dims, n_dims, MATE, SE, CI_low, CI_high, MATE_exp)

cat("\nLatent dimension sensitivity:\n")
print(axis3_results)
write.csv(axis3_results, "sensitivity_axis3_dim_selection.csv", row.names = FALSE)


cat("SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS SUMMARY\n")

cat("\nAxis 1 — Residual Confounding:\n");  print(axis1_results)
cat("\nAxis 2 — Spatial Prior:\n");         print(axis2_tbl)
cat("\nAxis 3 — Dim Selection:\n");         print(axis3_results)

saveRDS(axis2_fits, "sensitivity_axis2_fits.RDS")
cat("\n All sensitivity outputs saved.\n")
```

```{r visualization, cache=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

col_yes  <- "#3c0f5b"   # CI excludes zero
col_no   <- "#E85D75"  # CI includes zero
col_tip  <- "black"  # tipping point
col_base <- "#A4CD55"

# PANEL 1: Axis 1 — CI ribbon as sigma_gamma increases

mate_base    <- axis1_results$MATE[axis1_results$sigma_gamma == 0]
se_base       <- axis1_results$SE[axis1_results$sigma_gamma == 0]
t_crit        <- qt(0.975, df = df_m1)
sigma_tipping <- sqrt(pmax((mate_base / t_crit)^2 - se_base^2, 0))

cat(sprintf("Tipping point sigma_gamma: %.4f\n", sigma_tipping))

ribbon_df <- data.frame(sigma_gamma = sigma_seq) %>%
  mutate(
    SE      = sqrt(se_base^2 + sigma_gamma^2),
    CI_low  = mate_base - t_crit * SE,
    CI_high = mate_base + t_crit * SE,
    sig     = CI_low > 0
  )

# Observed points from axis1_results
obs_df <- axis1_results %>%
  mutate(sig = CI_low > 0)

p_axis1 <- ggplot(ribbon_df, aes(x = sigma_gamma)) +

  geom_ribbon(data = filter(ribbon_df, sigma_gamma <= sigma_tipping),
              aes(ymin = CI_low, ymax = CI_high),
              fill = col_yes, alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_ribbon(data = filter(ribbon_df, sigma_gamma >= sigma_tipping),
              aes(ymin = CI_low, ymax = CI_high),
              fill = col_no, alpha = 0.15) +

  geom_hline(yintercept = mate_base,
             color = col_base, linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "solid") +
  geom_line(aes(y = CI_low),  color = col_base, linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(y = CI_high), color = col_base, linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey60",
             linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dotted") +

  geom_vline(xintercept = sigma_tipping, color = col_tip,
             linewidth = 0.7, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text", x = sigma_tipping + 0.01, y = -0.55,
           label = sprintf("Tipping\npoint\n\u03c3\u03b3 = %.4f", sigma_tipping),
           hjust = 0, size = 4.2, color = col_tip, lineheight = 1.2) +

  geom_point(data = obs_df,
             aes(y = MATE, color = sig), size = 3.5, shape = 18) +
  geom_point(data = obs_df,
             aes(y = CI_low,  color = sig), size = 2.5, shape = 1) +
  geom_point(data = obs_df,
             aes(y = CI_high, color = sig), size = 2.5, shape = 1) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = col_yes, "FALSE" = col_no),
                     labels = c("TRUE" = "CI excludes 0",
                                "FALSE" = "CI includes 0")) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(-0.01, 0.55),
    breaks = sort(c(seq(0, 0.50, 0.10), round(sigma_tipping, 4))),
    labels = c(as.character(seq(0, 0.50, 0.10)),
           sprintf("%.3f*", sigma_tipping))
  ) +

  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.75, 1.1)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Axis 1: Residual Confounding Sensitivity",
    subtitle = "MATE point estimate fixed; CI widens as unmodelled confounding \u03c3\u03b3 increases",
    x        = "Residual Confounding SD (\u03c3\u03b3)",
    y        = "MATE on log(UIC)",
    color    = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title        = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle     = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey40"),
    axis.text         = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title        = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),
    legend.position   = "right",
    legend.justification = "top",
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = 10)
  )

# PANEL 2: Axis 2 — Spatial prior sensitivity dot plot
axis2_plot_df <- axis2_tbl %>%
  mutate(prior = factor(prior, levels = c("tight", "base", "diffuse"),
                        labels = c("Tight\nP(\u03c3>0.5)=0.01",
                                   "Base\nP(\u03c3>1.0)=0.01",
                                   "Diffuse\nP(\u03c3>2.0)=0.01")))

p_axis2 <- ggplot(axis2_plot_df,
                  aes(x = MATE, y = prior)) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey60",
             linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mate_base, color = col_base,
             linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.6) +

  geom_linerange(aes(xmin = CI_low, xmax = CI_high),
                 color = col_yes, linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(x = MATE), color = col_yes,
             size = 4, shape = 18) +

  geom_text(aes(x = CI_high + 0.002,
                label = sprintf("%.4f (%.4f, %.4f)",
                                MATE, CI_low, CI_high)),
            hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "grey20") +

  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.08, 0.52),
                     breaks = seq(0.10, 0.45, 0.05)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Axis 2: Spatial Prior Sensitivity",
    subtitle = "M1 refitted under tight / base / diffuse PC priors on spatial precision",
    x        = "MATE on log(UIC)",
    y        = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "grey40"),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 13, lineheight = 1.3),
    axis.text.x   = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x  = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position  = "none",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 40, 10, 40)
  )

# PANEL 3: Axis 3 — Dim selection dot plot
axis3_plot_df <- axis3_results %>%
  mutate(
    dim_set = factor(dim_set,
                     levels = rev(c("Manual (1,7,10)",
                                    "KL > 0.25", "KL > 0.5", "KL > 1.0"))),
    label = sprintf("Dims: %s  (n=%d)", dims, n_dims)
  )

p_axis3 <- ggplot(axis3_plot_df,
                  aes(x = MATE, y = dim_set)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey60",
             linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mate_base, color = col_base,
             linewidth = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_linerange(aes(xmin = CI_low, xmax = CI_high),
                 color = col_yes, linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.8,
                 position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = MATE), color = col_yes,
             size = 4, shape = 18,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)) +
  geom_text(
    aes(x = CI_high + 0.01,
        label = sprintf("%.4f (%.4f, %.4f)\n[%s]",
                        MATE, CI_low, CI_high, label)),
    hjust = 0, size = 5, color = "grey20", lineheight = 1.0,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.05, 0.55),
                     breaks = seq(0.10, 0.50, 0.10)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(add = 1.8)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Axis 3: Latent Dimension Selection Sensitivity",
    subtitle = "M1 refitted using dims selected by KL threshold vs manual selection",
    x        = "MATE on log(UIC)",
    y        = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, margin = margin(b = 10), 
                                      hjust = 0),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 12, color = "grey40", margin = margin(b = 20),
                                      hjust = 0),
    legend.position    = "none",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x       = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(t = 15)),
    plot.margin        = margin(30, 60, 30, 30)
  )

# Step 3: Combine cleanly
combined_sensitivity <- (p_axis1 / p_axis2 / p_axis3) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(2.2, 1, 1)) +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Bayesian Sensitivity Analysis — MATE of Urbanicity on log(UIC)",
    subtitle = "Following Gustafson et al. | ENNS 2018–2021 | CEVAE + INLA",
    caption  = sprintf(
      "Dashed vertical line = base M1 estimate (%.4f) | *Tipping point at \u03c3\u03b3 = %.4f",
      mate_base, sigma_tipping
    ),
    theme = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, color = "grey40"),
      plot.caption  = element_text(size = 11, color = "grey50")
    )
  )

# Save each sensitivity axis separately
ggsave("sensitivity_axis1.pdf", p_axis1,
       width = 8, height = 6, device = "pdf")
cat("✓ Saved: sensitivity_axis1.pdf\n")

ggsave("sensitivity_axis2.pdf", p_axis2,
       width = 8, height = 6, device = "pdf")
cat("✓ Saved: sensitivity_axis2.pdf\n")

ggsave("sensitivity_axis3.pdf", p_axis3,
       width = 7, height = 5, device = "pdf")
cat("✓ Saved: sensitivity_axis3.pdf\n")

# Then still save the combined panel if you want
ggsave("sensitivity_analysis_plot.pdf", combined_sensitivity,
       width = 13, height = 13, device = "pdf")
cat("✓ Saved: sensitivity_analysis_plot.pdf\n")
```

```{r save-sensitivity-workspace, include=FALSE}
workspace_path <- "~/thesis_char/Thesis/sensitivity_workspace.RData"

objects_to_save <- c(
  # ── AXIS 1: Residual Confounding ──────────────────────────────
  "axis1_results",          # Main sensitivity table
  "mate_base",              # Base estimate
  "se_base",                # Base SE
  "sigma_tipping",          # Tipping-point calculation
  "sigma_seq",              # Sigma sequence for plotting
  
  # ── AXIS 2: Spatial Prior Sensitivity ─────────────────────────
  "axis2_fits",             # Fits under different priors
  "axis2_results",          # Pooled results per prior
  "axis2_tbl",              # Summary table
  
  # ── AXIS 3: Latent Dimension Selection ────────────────────────
  "axis3_results",          # Main dimension sensitivity table
  "kl_df",                  # Full KL divergence data
  "kl_mean_by_dim",         # KL means by dimension
  "dim_sets"                # Dimension sets used
)

# Only save what exists
objects_to_save <- objects_to_save[objects_to_save %in% ls()]

save(list = objects_to_save, file = workspace_path)

cat("✓ Sensitivity workspace saved:", round(file.info(workspace_path)$size / 1e6, 1), "MB\n")
cat("Objects saved:", length(objects_to_save), "\n")
```
